name: leaflet
when_to_use: For any scene involving geographic maps, travel routes, country outlines, city markers, spatial data visualization, or location-based content
api_reference: LEAFLET — MAP LIBRARY Leaflet renders interactive maps in the browser. In Remotion, use useEffect + useRef to create the map instance and useCurrentFrame() to animate it. CORE CLASSES: - L.map(container, options) — creates a map. Key options: { zoomControl: false, attributionControl: false, dragging: false, scrollWheelZoom: false } - L.tileLayer(urlTemplate).addTo(map) — adds tile layer. Use 'https://tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png' for standard tiles or 'https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png' for dark theme - map.setView([lat, lng], zoom, { animate: false }) — set center and zoom (animate:false for frame-perfect control) - map.flyTo([lat, lng], zoom) — smooth animated transition (use sparingly, prefer manual interpolation) - map.fitBounds(bounds) — fit to geographic bounds MARKERS & SHAPES: - L.marker([lat, lng]).addTo(map) — add point marker - L.circleMarker([lat, lng], { radius, color, fillColor, fillOpacity }).addTo(map) — styled circle - L.polyline([[lat1,lng1],[lat2,lng2]], { color, weight, dashArray }).addTo(map) — route line - L.polygon([[lat1,lng1],...], { color, fillColor, fillOpacity }).addTo(map) — area shape - L.popup().setLatLng([lat,lng]).setContent('Label').openOn(map) — info popup - L.geoJSON(geojsonData, { style: feature => ({...}) }).addTo(map) — render GeoJSON ANIMATION TECHNIQUES: - Animate camera: interpolate lat/lng/zoom per frame with Remotion's interpolate() - Animate route: draw polyline progressively by slicing coordinate array based on frame - Animate markers: add/reveal markers at specific frames with spring opacity - Animate zoom: interpolate zoom level for dramatic reveal effects IMPORTANT COORDINATES: - New York: [40.7128, -74.006] - London: [51.5074, -0.1278] - Paris: [48.8566, 2.3522] - Tokyo: [35.6762, 139.6503] - Sydney: [-33.8688, 151.2093] - Los Angeles: [34.0522, -118.2437]
forbidden_patterns: Do NOT use L.map() inside render — only in useEffect with ref
Do NOT use map.flyTo() or map.panTo() with animate:true — use frame-based interpolation instead for deterministic rendering
MUST set explicit width and height on the container div
MUST call map.remove() in useEffect cleanup to prevent memory leaks
MUST disable all interactive controls (zoomControl, dragging, scrollWheelZoom) since video is non-interactive
MUST pass animate: false to setView() for frame-perfect rendering
